title: ‘Strong Talks’ With Iran?
summary_full: President Trump’s latest statements about discussions with Iran don’t necessarily signal an end in sight to the war, but they do buy him some time.
summary_public: President Trump’s latest statements about discussions with Iran don’t necessarily signal an end in sight to the war, but they do buy him some time.
